# Quadratic equation graph is parabola

## Short Teaching Summary
The graphical representation of quadratic equations is a parabola, which has the equation form y = ax^2 + bx + c.

## Difficulty
0.00

## Prerequisites
- Quadratic equation form and definition

## Related Concepts
- Quadratic equation form and definition (requires)

## Misconceptions
- None recorded.

## Best Examples
- A quadratic equation represents a parabola when plotted on a graph.
- The graph of a quadratic equation is a parabola.

## Best Analogy
- None recorded.
